summary.verdictReason: 25 KILL verdicts across 4 guides: gpt-5-prose-issues 14, narrator-seep 5, intent-smear 4, negation-addiction 2.

findings.line: Shelves, crates, a bench. Storage room.
findings.suggestedFix: Shelves, crates, a bench: storage room.

findings.line: No guard. No barricade.
findings.suggestedFix: The approach stood open—unguarded, unbarricaded.

findings.line: Work voice. Too even.
findings.suggestedFix: Her work voice came out too even.

findings.line: Scholarly order sat over butcher's work, making the cuts look methodical.
findings.suggestedFix: The cuts were neat, methodical.

findings.line: Worse: as if she had stayed.
findings.suggestedFix: Worse: she stood like she belonged there.

findings.line: Colder than betrayal: a weakness she could not ignore.
findings.suggestedFix: A weakness she could not ignore.

findings.line: He meant it.
findings.suggestedFix: There was no strain in his voice.

findings.line: Wise.
findings.suggestedFix: Delete the fragment.

findings.line: That detail would have meant nothing outside this room. Here it meant too much.
findings.suggestedFix: Here, the chalk mattered.

findings.line: With Kel'Thuzad dead, the wards and routines kept cycling on their own.
findings.suggestedFix: Even dead, Kel'Thuzad left the wards cycling.

findings.line: The discard rooms had not changed.
findings.suggestedFix: Hooks. Vats. Parts laid out by category.

findings.line: One more place a fourth hand should have been.
findings.suggestedFix: Automatic, and still built for four.

findings.line: This was what the side of the building was for.
findings.suggestedFix: The side route led straight into the work.

findings.line: One last useful fact, given before the body failed.
findings.suggestedFix: He gave one last useful fact before he folded.

findings.line: The plainness of it hit harder than a sneer.
findings.suggestedFix: His plain delivery hit harder than a sneer.

findings.line: Sylvanas had her answer: Jaina was still useful and dangerous, but structure could hold her still longer than safety allowed.
findings.suggestedFix: Sylvanas had her answer: Jaina was still useful and dangerous, but Kel'Thuzad could keep her there longer by feeding her structure than safety allowed.

findings.line: Silence came down over the sanctum.
findings.suggestedFix: The sanctum went silent.

findings.line: Jaina kept pace easily enough, but the silence around her carried a different weight now.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina kept pace easily enough, but the quiet around her felt heavier now.

findings.line: A lecturer finishing a point.
findings.suggestedFix: Kel'Thuzad still sounded like he was lecturing.

findings.line: A scholar's office buried under stone and bones.
findings.suggestedFix: Books, boards, and specimen jars filled the stone room.

findings.line: No good time to say that aloud. Never.
findings.suggestedFix: She kept that to herself.

findings.line: Hearthglen was overwhelmed, and Stratholme was next.
findings.suggestedFix: If Hearthglen had broken, Stratholme came next.

findings.line: They fell back into line by habit, but the spacing stayed wrong.
findings.suggestedFix: They fell back into line by habit, but the old spacing never came back.

findings.line: Jaina stood three strides off the boards, not near the door, not with her staff raised, not standing like a captive.
findings.suggestedFix: Jaina stood three strides off the boards, away from the door, staff down, like she belonged in the room.

findings.line: Not touch-close. Escort-close.
findings.suggestedFix: Escort-close.

audits.cleanReason: All tic words under cap with physical/literal uses only.
